title: Spack stack template contract (v1)
description: Vocabulary and resolver semantics for a template set. Names accepted in stack.yaml.builds[*].class, .toolchain, and .nodes are defined here. Resolver-policy names (compiler/mpi/gpu_toolkit/target/match values) are open template-set vocabulary; the renderer must know how to resolve every name referenced. Mirrors docs/spack_stack_generation_design_v6.md § Template Contract Files.

schema_version.description: Contract schema version. v1 is this file.

build_classes.description: Map of build-class name → class shape. Each class is referenced from stack.yaml.builds[*].class.

toolchains.description: Map of toolchain name → resolver policy. Each toolchain is referenced from stack.yaml.builds[*].toolchain.

node_selectors.description: Map of selector name → match predicate. Each selector is referenced from stack.yaml.builds[*].nodes.

gpu_selectors.description: Map of GPU friendly name → arch + Spack vars. Referenced from per_system narrowing.

target_policies.description: Map of policy name → target resolution rule. Each policy is referenced from build_classes[*].default_target.

package_set_kind.description: Must appear in the spec source's kinds list.

requires.description: Capability names checked against profile. Known capabilities include runtime_cpu, runtime_gpu, mpi, gpu_toolkit, build_host.

allowed_compilers.description: If set, narrows the compiler resolver's output to this list of compiler IDs.

match.description: Predicate name from template-set vocabulary; resolves against profile.node_types[*].

arch_target.description: Arch label (e.g., sm_80, sm_90, gfx90a, gfx942).

spack.description: Spack variant key/value pairs the renderer emits for this selector (e.g., cuda_arch: "80", amdgpu_target: gfx90a).

resolve.description: Resolver-policy name from template-set vocabulary; resolves against profile.node_types[*].cpu.

hard_require.description: When true, rejects target mismatches instead of falling back.
